dreams: Be a Thai GL actress and a doctor; family acceptance of sexuality; competent friends; culinary school and other arts/humanities/sciences study; a strong residency; time for sports and family
lessons_attracted: Attracts friends with mental-health problems, small-minded people, things she speaks about, urgent life-changing decisions, and lessons from blind trust or unreciprocated love
life_events: Closeted lesbian medical student; felt like an outcast in family and school
notes: Aries Venus/NN 12H; Cancer Saturn 3H; other Aries placements noted
text:
aries venus/nn (12th) (there are some more), cancer saturn (3rd). For context, I'm F21 closeted lesbian 5th year medical student. If i could really be anything careerwise, I'd like to be a thai gl actress and a doctor (not sure which one would be the side job tho). Other than career, I'd like to have my sexuality accepted by my family as well and to be friends with a lot of different yet higly competent people. Things that I just know I'll do is to pursue culinary school just for the sake of it, because I love to cook, and probably other types of arts, humanities and sciences degrees as well. I'd also like to do my residency in a great hospital so I can see a lot of interesting cases, and after my training, have enought time to practice the sports that I love and don't be so away from my family - I was kinda an outcast in my family and school as I grew up.
I attract a lot of people with mental health problems, specially friends, and small-minded people - most don't aim much for themselves and so they never expect me to achieve what I do. I also tend to attract things that I speak about. Also I kinda attract really important decisions with a close choice-deadline, so life-changing events are kinda frequent and filled with impulsivity. I also tend to take dumb decisions because of blind trust or unreciprocrated love.

notes: Degrees given: Gemini Venus 26° 2H, Aquarius NN 29° 10H, Capricorn SaturnRx 12° 8H
text: Taurus Rising; 26°Gemini Venus in 2H + 29°Aquarius NN in 10H + 12°Capricorn SaturnRx in 8H; job stability issues since I was 15/16 years old I’m now 37. I don’t eat more than once or twice a day most days. Lately it’s increased to at least twice a day. Was homeless off and on since 18 years old. Romantic relationships pretty much nonexistent and I don’t put up with a lot I have a low tolerance and see that I’d have to overlook so much and be mistreated to be in one so far and I’m not for that. No family relationships or connections. No friendships. My dreams have been to be able to afford whatever I want, be a humanitarian/philanthropist, be successful in the Music & Entertainment Industry, have a Fashion Line, Have a bunch of children and homeschool them, be married to the love of my life, have a great body, great skin and looks, have and leave a legacy, make loads of money easily be and actress and judge. I attract obsessive people, people who need healing, people who are less competent, job/financial opportunities, nice housing usually, women and men that are pansexual, ppl who don’t realize they are narcissistic, people who want a change, people who need saving, emotional/sensitive people, people who want to do things for me, soft dominant women, talkative people, spiritual people, and tarot card readers.

My biggest dream right now is to break free from my family, travel the world, meet people and find myself, which my family heavily disapproves of. I have a plan and it’ll take time, emotional resilience and patience and some hope. Keeping my fingers crossed. Wish me luck. 🥺

dreams: Have enough land to grow a food forest and teach people about native plants and foraging
lessons_attracted: Trust intuition; trust actions and patterns over words; know she is stronger than she thought
life_events: Father died unexpectedly in 2023; husband emotionally cheated and later cheated with her half sister; mother died unexpectedly almost two weeks ago
text: Taurus rising. Venus in Pisces in the 11th house, north node in Gemini in the 2nd house, and Saturn in Scorpio in the 7th house. Last few years have been pretty bad…and last few months have been worse. My dad died unexpectedly a few years ago (2023), and then my husband emotionally cheated on me shortly after. Then, just about a month ago, found out my husband had been cheating on me with my half sister (who seduced him, which doesn’t at all excuse what he did, but hurt twice as much, because she’s my sister, that I’ve known my whole life) for months, and then my mom died unexpectedly almost 2 weeks ago. I am finally getting closer to achieving my dream though, which is to have enough land to grow a food forest, and teach people about native plants and foraging. I finally got the land, and have started working on the food forest! Lessons I’ve attracted are to 1) trust my intuition, 2) don’t trust words, trust actions and patterns, 3) I’m stronger than I ever thought possible. Luckily, things always end up working out for me in the end; I’m divinely protected, and the universe always provides…eventually.
